title: tagetes lemmonii
intro: Tagetes lemmonii, also known as the Mexican marigold or Lemmon's marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tagetes lemmonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues.
